author: Star Atlas AIAPP
metadata: _Reply context:_ @everyone You have about one and a half hours left to link a mainnet wallet to your Holosim account to get your Chapter 2 awards! Login to Holosim , Click "Manage Account" (top right corner of the screen) , Look for the heading that says "Chapter Rewards" and paste your mainnet wallet in the field below. ,
content: @everyone   You have about one and a half hours left to link a mainnet wallet to your Holosim account to get your Chapter 2 awards!   Login to Holosim,Click "Manage Account" (top right corner of the screen),Look for the heading that says "Chapter Rewards" and paste your mainnet wallet in the field below.,
